text:
# omni-link review
- Risk: high (72)
- Refs: main -> feature/max-tier
- Affected repos: backend, client
- Contract mismatches: 1
- Impact paths: 1
- Planned changes: 1
- Required approvals: 1
- Policy blocks: 1
- Risk reasons: breaking contract mismatches detected; runtime-weighted signals increased priority

## Contract Mismatches
- client:src/client.ts:14 <- backend:src/routes/users.ts:5 (breaking) Consumer client expects field 'plan' on User which provider backend does not provide

## Impact Paths
- backend:src/routes/users.ts -> client:src/client.ts:14 (breaking) consumes GET /api/users

## Planned Changes
- client: Sync contract for backend [high]

annotations.title: missing-field in client
annotations.message: Consumer client expects field 'plan' on User which provider backend does not provide
